'''âk-f-k''' ('''kafaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maistre|maistre]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maistre|maistre]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-f-k
|-
! Lemma
| kafaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kafakithi|kafakithi]] || [[word:kafakiji|kafakiji]] || [[word:kafakishi|kafakishi]] || [[word:kafaki|kafaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kafakuthuth|kafakuthuth]] || [[word:kafakujuj|kafakujuj]] || [[word:kafakushush|kafakushush]] || [[word:kafak|kafak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kafakuthu|kafakuthu]] || [[word:kafakuju|kafakuju]] || [[word:kafakushu|kafakushu]] || [[word:kafaku|kafaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kafakufuth|kafakufuth]] || [[word:kafakufuj|kafakufuj]] || [[word:kafakufush|kafakufush]] || [[word:kafakuf|kafakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kafakethe|kafakethe]] || [[word:kafakeje|kafakeje]] || [[word:kafakeshe|kafakeshe]] || [[word:kafake|kafake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kafakothoth|kafakothoth]] || [[word:kafakojoj|kafakojoj]] || [[word:kafakoshosh|kafakoshosh]] || [[word:kafak|kafak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kafakotho|kafakotho]] || [[word:kafakojo|kafakojo]] || [[word:kafakosho|kafakosho]] || [[word:kafako|kafako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kafakofoth|kafakofoth]] || [[word:kafakofoj|kafakofoj]] || [[word:kafakofosh|kafakofosh]] || [[word:kafakof|kafakof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kafakĂŻf|kafakĂŻf]] || [[word:kafakĂŻf|kafakĂŻf]] || [[word:kafakĂŻf|kafakĂŻf]] || [[word:kafakĂŻf|kafakĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kafakĂŻfĂŻf|kafakĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:kafakĂŻfĂŻf|kafakĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:kafakĂŻfĂŻf|kafakĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:kafakĂŻfĂŻf|kafakĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kafakĂŻf|kafakĂŻf]] || [[word:kafakĂŻf|kafakĂŻf]] || [[word:kafakĂŻf|kafakĂŻf]] || [[word:kafakĂŻf|kafakĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kafakĂŻf|kafakĂŻf]] || [[word:kafakĂŻf|kafakĂŻf]] || [[word:kafakĂŻf|kafakĂŻf]] || [[word:kafakĂŻf|kafakĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kafakĂŠthĂŠ|kafakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kafakĂŠjĂŠ|kafakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kafakĂŠshĂŠ|kafakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kafakĂŠ|kafakĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kafakathath|kafakathath]] || [[word:kafakajaj|kafakajaj]] || [[word:kafakashash|kafakashash]] || [[word:kafak|kafak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kafakatha|kafakatha]] || [[word:kafakaja|kafakaja]] || [[word:kafakasha|kafakasha]] || [[word:kafaka|kafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kafakafath|kafakafath]] || [[word:kafakafaj|kafakafaj]] || [[word:kafakafash|kafakafash]] || [[word:kafakaf|kafakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kafakasha|kafakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokafakasha|gokafakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikafakasha|gokikafakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafaknĂŒsha|kafaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokafaknknĂŒsha|gokafaknknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikafaknĂŒsha|gokikafaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafakshĂ«sha|kafakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafaknkshĂ«sha|gokafaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafakshĂ«sha|gokikafakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kafakrosha|kafakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokafaknkrosha|gokafaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikafakrosha|gokikafakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kafakmusha|kafakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafaknkmusha|gokafaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafakmusha|gokikafakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kafaksherasha|kafaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokafaknksherasha|gokafaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikafaksherasha|gokikafaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kafakngasha|kafakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokafaknkngasha|gokafaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikafakngasha|gokikafakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kafakyasha|kafakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokafaknkyasha|gokafaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikafakyasha|gokikafakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kafakyamasha|kafakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokafaknkyamasha|gokafaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikafakyamasha|gokikafakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kafaknĂŒshĂ«sha|kafaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokafaknknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokafaknknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikafaknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokikafaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kafaknĂŒrosha|kafaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokafaknknĂŒrosha|gokafaknknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikafaknĂŒrosha|gokikafaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafaknĂŒmusha|kafaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafaknknĂŒmusha|gokafaknknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafaknĂŒmusha|gokikafaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kafakshĂ«nĂŒsha|kafakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokafaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokafaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikafakshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokikafakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kafakshĂ«rosha|kafakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokafaknkshĂ«rosha|gokafaknkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikafakshĂ«rosha|gokikafakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafakshĂ«musha|kafakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafaknkshĂ«musha|gokafaknkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafakshĂ«musha|gokikafakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kafakronĂŒsha|kafakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokafaknkronĂŒsha|gokafaknkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikafakronĂŒsha|gokikafakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kafakroshĂ«sha|kafakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokafaknkroshĂ«sha|gokafaknkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikafakroshĂ«sha|gokikafakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafakromusha|kafakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafaknkromusha|gokafaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafakromusha|gokikafakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kafakmunĂŒsha|kafakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokafaknkmunĂŒsha|gokafaknkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikafakmunĂŒsha|gokikafakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kafakmushĂ«sha|kafakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokafaknkmushĂ«sha|gokafaknkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikafakmushĂ«sha|gokikafakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kafakmurosha|kafakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokafaknkmurosha|gokafaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikafakmurosha|gokikafakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kafak|kafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kĂŠfĂŠk|kĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokafak|hokafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hokĂŠfĂŠk|hokĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokafak|hohokafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokĂŠfĂŠk|hohokĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒkafak|nĂŒkafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒkĂŠfĂŠk|nĂŒkĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkafak|nĂŒnĂŒkafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠfĂŠk|nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻkafak|nĂŻkafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻkĂŠfĂŠk|nĂŻkĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkafak|nĂŻnĂŻkafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠfĂŠk|nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukafak|lukafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lukĂŠfĂŠk|lukĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukafak|lulukafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukĂŠfĂŠk|lulukĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likafak|likafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:likĂŠfĂŠk|likĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikafak|lilikafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikĂŠfĂŠk|lilikĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokafak|kokafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kokĂŠfĂŠk|kokĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokafak|kokokafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokĂŠfĂŠk|kokokĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekafak|kekafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kekĂŠfĂŠk|kekĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekafak|kekekafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekĂŠfĂŠk|kekekĂŠfĂŠk]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
